scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,orch,worker,sched,rt,web -c "blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white" "npx.cmd pnpm@9 --dir backend -F @flowforge/api dev" "npx.cmd pnpm@9 --dir backend -F @flowforge/orchestrator dev" "npx.cmd pnpm@9 --dir backend -F @flowforge/worker dev" "npx.cmd pnpm@9 --dir backend -F @flowforge/scheduler dev" "npx.cmd pnpm@9 --dir backend -F @flowforge/realtime dev" "npx.cmd pnpm@9 --dir frontend dev"
